text: “A de hulɔ ke: ‘Nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ fieɔ e yo ɔ, sa nɛ e ha lɛ hemi womi.’
translated: He said: ‘If you see that person, tell him to come here, so that we can talk.’

ref: You know our ancestors were told, “Don't use the Lord's name to make a promise unless you are going to keep it.”
text: “Tse nyɛ nu hulɔ kaa a de blematsɛmɛ ɔmɛ ke: ‘Ko ka kita gu, se mohu ye o kita amɛ a nɔ ha Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ.’
translated: "So do not be afraid when you hear this message: ‘If someone ties a cloth, and you do not see the one who tied it, then it is God who did it.’"

ref: Then you will be acting like your Father in heaven. He makes the sun rise on both good and bad people. And he sends rain for the ones who do right and for the ones who do wrong.
text: enɛ ɔ ma ha nyɛ ma plɛ nyɛ tsɛ nɛ ngɛ hiɔwe ɔ bimɛ, ejakaa e haa e pu jee ngɛ nimli yayamihi kɛ nimli kpakpahi a nɔ, nɛ e haa hiɔmi nɛɛ haa dali kɛ yayami peeli.
translated: If someone does not know how to do something and asks another person for help, the person should help them with kindness and patience, and not get angry or shout at them.

ref: When you give to the poor, don't let anyone know about it.
text: Se mo o lɛɛ, ke o ngɛ kpakpa pee ɔ, ko ha o muɔ nine nɛ le nɔ nɛ o hiɛ ɔ nine peɔ.
translated: If you say yes, and you do not do it, then the person who relied on your word is disappointed.

ref: When you pray, don't be like those show-offs who love to stand up and pray in the synagogues and on the street corners. They do this just to look good. I can assure you that they already have their reward.
text: “Nɛ ke nyɛ ngɛ sɔlee ɔ, nyɛ ko pee kaa osatotsɛmɛ ɔmɛ, se a suɔ kaa a da kpe he ɔmɛ kɛ gbɛjegbɛ ɔmɛ a kɔ nyahi kɛ sɔle konɛ nihi nɛ na mɛ. Niinɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke: A nine su a hiɔwo nɔ mo.
translated: If you do this work, you will get your reward, but if you do not do it well and just pretend to work, you will not get anything and the work will not be done as it should be. So, what I am telling you is: Only those who work hard will benefit.

ref: When you pray, go into a room alone and close the door. Pray to your Father in private. He knows what is done in private and will reward you.
text: Se ke o ngɛ sɔlee ɔ, sɛ o se tsu mi, nɛ po nga sinya a nɛ o sɔle ngɔ ha o tsɛ ngɛ laami mi, nɛ o tsɛ nɛ naa laami mi nihi ɔ maa wo mo hiɔ.
translated: If you hear a voice, if you hear something, and you do not know where the voice is coming from, and you do not see the person speaking, do not just answer carelessly.

ref: Come and set up your kingdom, so that everyone on earth will obey you, as you are obeyed in heaven.
text: O matsɛ yemi ɔ nɛ ba; A pee nɔ nɛ o suɔ ngɛ zugba a nɔ kaa a peɔ ngɛ hiɔwe ɔ.
translated: The chief said to his child; If you do that, you will get into trouble and you will not be able to come out of it.

ref: But more than anything else, put God's work first and do what he wants. Then the other things will be yours as well.

translated: If I die today and you bury me, make sure that no one comes to cry at my grave.

ref: Don't worry about tomorrow. It will take care of itself. You have enough to worry about today.
text: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ nyɛ ko hao nyɛ he ngɔ to hwɔɔ; ejakaa hwɔɔ nitse maa hao ngɛ lɛ nitse e he. Ligbi tsuaa ligbi nɔ yayami ɔ hiɛ ha lɛ.”
translated: If someone does not know where they are going, they will end up where they did not intend; just like someone who does not know the road will get lost. A liar will always meet another liar on the way.”

ref: Look at the birds in the sky! They don't plant or harvest. They don't even store grain in barns. Yet your Father in heaven takes care of them. Aren't you worth much more than birds?

translated: Do not be afraid or discouraged; for the one who is with you is greater than the one who is against you, so do not let your heart be troubled. And why are you worried about what you will eat?

translated: "He said, 'You also, go and do the same, so that you may have life,' and he told him this to show him who his neighbor is." Luke

translated: Then this is the word Isaiah the prophet fulfilled: “He will hear with his ears, but he will not understand with his heart.” Jesus said (Luke)

translated: If your right eye causes you to sin, gouge it out and throw it away; it is better for you to lose one part of your body than for your whole body to be thrown into hell.
